raw_consumer_statement:
First, and foremost, I have a Fraud Alert on all of my credit cards, that has been in place at least 10 years or more, so I was surprised that on XXXX, I was notified of an unauthorized fraudulent charge. On that same day, I immediately called, my " Barclay 's Master Card '' ( through XXXX XXXX ), and let them that it was not me, on XXXX. 
Now, it's XX/XX/year>, and I am still dealing with the exact same fraudulent charge that is now collecting interest. 
I froze the credit card, and then a new credit card was created, and unfortunately, Master Card transferred that same FRAUDULENT CHARGE over to the newly created credit card.

Therefore, the same Dispute remains unresolved. In fact, each time that I call, I am unable to remove the false charge and resolve this on-going issue. I have contacted the Fraud SecuritXXXX, Billing Dispute, and Customer Service, all to no avail. It very much feels like I am dealing with a foreign Country because there are no English speaking Agents that are able to effectively communicate, nor does it appear that the Master Card Agents are understanding me. I am a target of a false/fraudulent charge that I want remove immediately. This is financial fraud and abuse and theft by this banking institution.
